title: Spain - Tourist/Visit Visa

details.title: Eligibility
items: Valid passport with sufficient validity.
Clear purpose of travel to Spain or Schengen area.
Proof of sufficient financial means for the trip.
Travel medical insurance covering all Schengen countries.
Confirmed travel itinerary including flight and accommodation.
Proof of employment, business, or student status.

details.title: Required Documents
items: Spanish Schengen visa application form duly filled and signed by the applicant (both parents must sign for minors).
Two recent color passport-size photographs (35x45 mm) with white background (gents with uncovered head) glued to the application form.
Original passport and photocopy (issued within the last 10 years, valid for at least 3 months beyond visa expiry) including personal data page, relevant pages and previous visas.
For non-Bangladeshi applicants: Bangladesh residence permit valid at least 3 months after Schengen visa expiry.
Visa fee payment.
Medical insurance covering minimum €30,000 including repatriation, valid for the entire stay in all Schengen states.
Photocopy (full page) of return flight booking.
Hotel confirmation, hotel voucher, or other proof of accommodation for the entire stay.
Original personal and company bank statements and credit card statements for the last 6 months, updated, signed and stamped by the bank or branch manager.
If visiting family or friends: Letter of invitation, proof of sponsorship and supporting documents showing family relationship or ties.
If employed: Certificate of employment including company address, phone, fax, countersigning officer name and position, applicant designation, salary, years of service and approved leave.

If self-employed: Certificate of Incorporation, Memorandum and Articles of Association, Trade License legalized by MOFA and translated into Spanish, plus Income Tax Return for last year or TIN certificate.

If student: Proof of enrolment and leave certificate from institution including address, phone and permission details. For school trips, letter from school mentioning purpose, duration and destination.
If travelling with spouse or children: Marriage certificate issued by responsible authority, legalized by MOFA and translated into Spanish.
Civil status documents such as Marriage Certificate, Divorce Certificate (Talak Nama), Death Certificate (if widowed), and Birth Certificate for children.

For minors: Parental consent if both parents are not travelling together, photocopy of parents or legal guardian passport, proof of financial means of guardian and original birth certificate of minor.
Personal covering letter explaining the purpose of travel and detailed itinerary.
Full set of A4 size one-sided photocopies of all documents for scanning purposes.

note: All expenditures related to visa processing are strictly non-refundable. Visa information and associated charges are subject to change at any time without prior notice. We provide assistance only and do not guarantee the issuance of visas. This information sheet has been prepared by us and may include additional details beyond the embassy's requirements.
